title: Gold Golem
description: An experimental mod that adds all sorts of wacky stuff to your world. Adds blocks, foods, entities and biomes. Beware, this mod isn't balanced properly at all, and I have no plans to ever do so!
body:
# What is Gold Golem?
An experimental mod that adds all sorts of wacky stuff to your world. Adds blocks, foods, entities and biomes. Gold Golem comes packed with things like: new animal variants(biome-specific), more plant types, dangerous mobs, new weapons, new tool sets, and cool biomes.
NOTE: Beware, this mod isn't balanced properly at all, and I currently have no plans to ever do so! However, in saying this, if you guys like this mod and want me to expand or balance the current features, I may come back and visit this mod, as I have a few newer, unreleased versions of Gold Golem. :)
NOTE: This mod doesn't add a 'Golden Golem' mob, it's just the name of the mod :p
Make sure to check out my UDP mod collection. And have a fantastic day(or night). :)
